feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,138Chapters: 10/16Kudos: 146

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.title: Behind Our Masks
entry.summary:
Author: WriteMeLikeDia

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,401Chapters: 13/20Kudos: 25

Summary: Clark Kent is sent to Gotham, tasked with uncovering Bruce Wayne's secret identity as Batman. At first, the banter and tease doesn't take them far, until the two eventually fall into a very complicated relationship.—————By their third shots, Clark feels bold enough to ask, “What about you? Any romantic history?” Bruce doesn’t hesitate to answer with a straight, “No.” “No as in… nothing?” “Never been with a woman,” Bruce says, then adds, “or a man.” Or a man. Clark tries to play a neutral reaction, yet his voice can’t help but come out a little too intrigued as he whispers, “Oh.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Your Person
entry.summary:
Author: SadToad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,397Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Bruce has been overworking himself to the brink of exhaustion, and Clark notices. When he decided to confront Bruce about how he's treating his body, the two get into a heated argument where everyone's true feelings start to come to light.

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,531Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 388

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: Thank you for dinner baby (I had a really great time)
entry.summary:
Author: BERGHAlN

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,978Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 19

Summary: “Why don’t you come in? I can give you a tour of the mansion.” Bruce got out of the car, staggering slightly from the alcohol. Clark smiled, following the man and staring at the back of his neck. “Sure, but only if you show me every floor.” or, Clark is a famous and successful TV presenter, obsessed with Bruce Wayne, a Gotham billionaire who avoids him at any cost. A party and a week might change that. And maybe Clark will finally manage to get Bruce to open his doors to him.

entry.title: A Pop of Color
entry.summary:
Author: remember_april_andbeglad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,025Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 67

Summary: Somewhere, deep in the Batcave, a head-to-toe bright yellow Dick grins back at the two adults staring at him. A trail of tiny yellow footprints follows behind him. Even the walls are dotted with yellow footprints. Bruce doesn't hide his small smile. Alfred turns to Bruce. "While you were courting Mister Kent, it appears that young Mister Grayson has taken it upon himself to accentuate your nocturnal dwelling site with a... 'pop of color,' as they say." - Bruce asks Clark to pick up Dick from school. Bruce and Clark proceed to be totally normal about it. [Every work in this series can be read as a one-shot!]

entry.summary:

entry.title: background
entry.summary:
Author: when_it_is_complicated

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,590Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 18

Summary: After leaving Arkham Asylum, Clark called the number he had for Bruce Wayne. It went straight to voicemail. "Hi, this is Clark Kent. I'm in town, thought I should check in." He left his number, in case it didn't end up attached.

entry.title: good things come in threes
entry.summary:
Author: elysianprince

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,582Chapters: 3/17Kudos: 47

Summary: "So, what do you say? Just you and me on this one. Like old times?" There was a glimmer of hope in those inhumanly blue eyes of Kent's as he waited for Batman to answer. It was ridiculous to refer to something that was less than a year ago as 'old times,' but Superman had been frustratingly overly-familiar the last few times they had spoken, and it seemed that wasn't something distance had changed. Bruce decided to humor him.Bruce is trying to find the balance between his responsibility for Dick and his partnership with Robin. Clark is trying to navigate catching feelings at the office again, so to speak. Dick just wants to be taken seriously, and maybe for Batman and Superman to stop being so stupid about each other. Somehow, the crime ring trafficking alien creatures in their two cities might just be the answer they've all been looking for.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,686Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 32

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

entry.title: A green-eyed monster
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,548Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 201

Summary: "Big Blue, please calm down," Hal Jordan hissed in his ear, looking ready to pull out the kryptonite at any moment, "Your eyes are getting red." "I'm calm," Clark lied shamelessly, clenching his fists and trying to smile, but there was something wrong with his face, something too stiff, "See? I am serene and perfectly calm." "If you pierce Prince Xerxes' head with your damn laser beams, Sinestro will find a way to ally with the Senordians, make them his Yellow Lanterns, and it will be a problem not only for Green Lanterns but for the entire galaxy."   (Batman is getting married, and Clark has to figure out why he's so upset that he's not the groom.)

entry.title: when you wish upon a star
entry.summary:
Author: remycchi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,267Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 83

Summary: Clark finds himself in a world similar to that of a fairy tale— but something isn't quite right. Kal turned to stare at the stranger. His face seemed tired despite the easy smile on his lips. The lights of the chandeliers played on his features, casting shadows where there should have been none. It was as though he could simply fade away, untethered to reality, nothing but a ghost of a dream. Kal knew, then, that should he let the stranger go, he would never see him again. “Would you like to dance with me?”

entry.title: But you can't take the circus from the boy
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,506Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 190

Summary: Damian Wayne has everything he's ever wanted. A beautiful husband. A precious child. A title of his own. Even his siblings, having experienced horrors beyond their years, are growing as people alongside him. But with everything in his life moving so smoothly, he can't help but wonder when the other shoe will drop. Happiness isn't something that comes easily to Demons, after all.

entry.title: Bring the Bird Home
entry.summary:
Author: dolcesher

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,264Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 46

Summary: There had been one universe they’d visited in which he and Clark were together. Married. But Bruce refused to think about it. Everything was easier that way.Except now stood a child that seemed to be from a universe much like that one, where he and Clark were not just together, but parents.An eleven year old Dick Grayson is mysteriously transported from a parallel universe where he was adopted by Bruce and Clark as a baby. While Bruce takes care of him, he examines his relationship with his sons, and a certain Kryptonian that won't leave him alone.
